projects.title: AGN Incidence Across z = 4-9
projects.abstract: Measure AGN incidence in the EMERALD+DIVER galaxy sample using rest-optical diagnostics and broad-line indicators.

projects.title: Emission-Line Ratio Evolution
projects.abstract: Track how key emission-line ratios evolve with redshift and connect ionization conditions to host-galaxy properties.

projects.title: Host Galaxy and Nuclear Activity Connection
projects.abstract: Link AGN signatures with stellar mass growth, star-formation activity, and morphology in deep legacy fields.

content.heroIntro: Browse announced EMERALD+DIVER science projects, join by selecting your Co-I name, and submit new projects with title, abstract, and contact details.
